title: Clinical Guidance for Perinatal Hepatitis B Testing | Hepatitis B | CDC
text:
with the use of autologous gametes: a committee opinion 
Strategies, based on scientific principles and experience, to reduce the risk of viral transmission in couples seeking treatment for infertility using their own gamete. 
Recommendations for practices using gestational carriers: a committee opinion 
Recommendations for the screening, evaluation, and psychoeducational and legal counseling of gestational carriers and intended parents as well as HBV and HCV testing recommendations. 
Patient resources 
Resources covering the preventative measures a parent with hepatitis B can take to protect their baby.
